text: Even after generation, there is one more problem: extracting the actual 64 by 64 skin file.
pronounce_text: Even after generation, there is one more problem: extracting the actual sixty-four by sixty-four skin file.

text: Diffusion models usually output RGB images, not clean RGBA textures. But Minecraft outer layers need transparency.
pronounce_text: Diffusion models usually output RGB images, not clean RGBA textures. But Minecraft outer layers need transparency.

text: A simple background-color threshold is unreliable. If the background is gray, and the character also contains gray pixels, the algorithm can confuse foreground with background.Generated boundaries can also blur into gradients.
pronounce_text: A simple background-color threshold is unreliable. If the background is gray, and the character also contains gray pixels, the algorithm can confuse foreground with background.Generated boundaries can also blur into gradients.

text: To solve this, we used an Alpha Marker Strategy.
pronounce_text: To solve this, we used an Alpha Marker Strategy.

text: During dataset construction, transparent pixels in the UV map get a tiny white marker in the center. The model learns to reproduce these markers.
pronounce_text: During dataset construction, transparent pixels in the UV map get a tiny white marker in the center. The model learns to reproduce these markers.

text: During post-processing, the extraction algorithm detects those small white feature anchors and classifies the corresponding pixels as transparent.
pronounce_text: During post-processing, the extraction algorithm detects those small white feature anchors and classifies the corresponding pixels as transparent.

text: The limitation is that this only handles two states: Fully transparent and opaque. Semi-transparent materials, like glass or veils, still need better handling.
pronounce_text: The limitation is that this only handles two states: Fully transparent and opaque. Semi-transparent materials, like glass or veils, still need better handling.
